title: CONCERTO and CHAMBER: Contact-rich Coordination with Opaque, Heterogeneous Teammates
description: CONCERTO is a safety stack and training loop for physically-coupled ad-hoc cooperation with black-box partners; CHAMBER is the accompanying benchmark (CHAMBER-Bench v1.0: admission-gated tasks, a versioned partner zoo, verifiable result bundles, and a per-task leaderboard). This record archives the v0.8.0 software release. The benchmark data artifacts — partner sets, leaderboard bundles, and reference/probe trajectories — are hosted on Hugging Face with Croissant metadata; the linked repository lists their canonical locations.
